tests.scenario: Validation of free trial terms display on sign-up page
steps: Navigate to the app's sign-up page
Tap on the 'Start Free Trial' button
Verify that a summary of the free trial terms is presented
tests.expected_result: The summary of free trial terms includes the duration and any charges that will be incurred after the trial period, and is clear and concise

steps: Log in to the account
Navigate to account settings
Cancel subscription
tests.expected_result: The subscription is cancelled within 2 steps

tests.scenario: Validate confirmation email sent after subscription cancellation
steps: Log in to the system with a registered user's credentials
Cancel the user's subscription
Verify the system processes the cancellation
Check the user's registered email inbox within 5 minutes
Retrieve and open the confirmation email sent by the system
tests.expected_result: The confirmation email contains a summary of the cancellation and relevant details, and was sent to the user's registered email address within 5 minutes of cancellation

tests.scenario: Validate meditation library content and updates
steps: Establish a stable internet connection
Access the meditation library
Verify the total number of meditation sessions available
Identify and count new meditation sessions added within the last month
Verify clear indications of new content added within the last month
tests.expected_result: The user can browse and play at least 500 meditation sessions, with clear indications of at least 20 new sessions added within the last month

steps: Prepare a device capable of playing high-quality audio
Select a meditation session or sleep story with known audio specifications (128 kbps, 44.1 kHz)
Play the selected meditation session or sleep story on the device
Verify that the audio plays continuously without distortion or skipping
tests.expected_result: The audio plays without distortion or skipping, with clear and crisp sound, confirming a minimum of 128 kbps bitrate and 44.1 kHz sample rate

tests.scenario: Filter and search sleep stories by categories
steps: Log in to the system as a valid user
Navigate to the sleep story section
Apply filters for story type 'nature', narrator 'female', and duration '30 minutes'
Verify that the search results are displayed
Check that the displayed sleep stories match the applied filters
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of sleep stories that match the user's criteria, with clear information on story type, narrator, and duration

tests.scenario: Stable meditation session experience across devices
steps: Establish a stable internet connection on a test device
Initiate a meditation session on the test device
Monitor the meditation session for interruptions or glitches
Verify the session continues uninterrupted for a set duration (e.g., 10 minutes)
tests.expected_result: The meditation session plays continuously without interruption or glitch

tests.scenario: Validate accessibility features for users with vision impairments
steps: Launch the app on a device
Enable accessibility features and voice assistance
Activate the screen reader
Navigate through the app's main menu and various screens
tests.expected_result: The app provides voice assistance and screen reader compatibility for navigation, allowing a user with vision impairments to use the app

steps: Create a user account and log in on two separate devices (Device A and Device B)
On Device A, complete a meditation session and record the session data
Log out of Device A and log in on Device B
On Device B, navigate to the meditation session history
tests.expected_result: The meditation session completed on Device A is reflected in the session history on Device B

tests.scenario: Validate guided meditation session starts playing within 2 seconds with a clear and calming voice
steps: Open the app
Select a meditation session
Record the time when the session starts playing
Verify the voice is clear and calming
Verify the background sounds are soothing
tests.expected_result: The meditation session starts playing within 2 seconds with a clear and calming voice

tests.scenario: Validate sleep story and calming sound playback
steps: Navigate to the sleep section of the system
Select a sleep story
Verify the audio starts playing within 1 second
Verify the audio can be looped continuously without interruption
Repeat steps 2-4 for calming sounds
tests.expected_result: The audio starts playing within 1 second and can be looped continuously for both sleep stories and calming sounds

tests.scenario: Validate user progress tracking and display
steps: Create a new user account and log in
Complete a meditation session of 30 minutes
Wait for 1 hour to simulate the time passing
Log in to the user's account and view the progress dashboard
tests.expected_result: The user's total practice time is displayed as 30 minutes and the number of sessions is displayed as 1, accurately reflecting their meditation practice within 1 hour of completing the session

tests.scenario: Verify clear and transparent pricing information on the Calm app's website and within the app
steps: Launch a web browser and navigate to the Calm app's website
Locate and click on the pricing or subscription section
Verify that the pricing information is clearly displayed
tests.expected_result: The pricing information includes a clear breakdown of all potential fees, including any trial periods, subscription rates, and cancellation policies

tests.scenario: Validate support request response and resolution time
steps: Create a user account with an active subscription
Simulate a subscription issue for the user
Submit a support request through the app or website
Verify that a response is received within 24 hours
Verify that the issue is resolved within 3 business days
tests.expected_result: The user receives a response to their support request within 24 hours and their subscription issue is resolved within 3 business days

steps: Log in to the app as a registered user
Navigate to the app's settings or account section
Verify that options to view, edit, and delete personal data are available
Select the option to view personal data
Verify that personal data is displayed accurately
Select the option to edit personal data
Make changes to personal data and save
Verify that changes are reflected in the view personal data section
Select the option to delete personal data
Confirm that personal data is deleted
Verify that an option to export personal data is available
Export personal data and verify that it is in a readable format
tests.expected_result: The user can view, edit, and delete their personal data, and export it in a readable format.
